subject: Vietnam shoe tariff speculation amid trade talks
claim_text: Analysts speculate Vietnam could face 20-30% tariffs on footwear if trade talks stall.

subject: Vietnam textile tariff increase 28% announced
claim_text: Administration announced 28% tariff on Vietnamese textile and fabric imports, effective June 1.

subject: Bangladesh garment exports face new 15% tariff
claim_text: New 15% tariff on garment and fabric exports from Bangladesh signed into law.

subject: 20% tariff on Indian pharmaceutical chemicals
claim_text: The US proposed a 20% tariff on pharmaceutical chemicals and active ingredients from India.

subject: 46% tariff proposed on Vietnamese footwear
claim_text: The administration is proposing a 46% tariff on footwear and shoes imported from Vietnam.
